Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I can detect hostile readings like Shadows, but when it comes to this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}And I was the one who insisted we search... I'm sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}It's not working out, after all... How could a machine like myself have feelings like a normal person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It's getting dark. We should probably give up the search for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'm happy that you took the time to indulge me in this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Yes, you're right. It's getting dark.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It's not working out, after all... How could a machine like myself have feelings like a normal person?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I'm happy that you took the time to indulge me in this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But it's getting dark. We should probably give up the search for today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm happy that you took the time to indulge me in this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It's not working out, after all... How could a machine like myself have feelings like a normal person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis is smiling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]Aigis a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I'll be going back alone today... I need some time to think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I'm sorry... And after you invited me out, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to go back[n]to the dorm separately.[n]{f 1 1}
